items.title: Amaravati to get quantum and AI innovation centre with IBM on June 18
items.summary: The State government said the Amaravati centre would link 380 quantum innovation cells and over 3,000 students and professors across engineering colleges

items.title: Lius Diaz dazzles as Colombia beat World Cup 2026 debutants Uzbekistan 3-1
